title: Ethereal Resonators
description: A vanilla+ mod that makes player battles more interesting by making castles and other medieval stuff the optimal strategy while also speeding up grind!
body:
In the Ethereal Resonators mod, each teams starts at a corner of the map, quickly get their necessary items, build their fortresses and go siege and kill their enemies.

![Example castle from the 15th Large Teams War](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a68669d2f315f1003076d0d410b486b87248db6f.png)

Each team must place and protect a resonator that will gradually accumulate health and stabilish stronger claim upon the territory in which it is placed. Respawning is not free, your 10 hearts must be consumed from a resonator belonging to your team. A team is defeated once they are all dead and have no resonators with more than 10 hearts to respawn them.

The mod makes cool things like building castles, matching team banners, farming outdoors and playing a goat horn prior to an attack all part of the optimal strategy. Grind for good gear is sped up, so expect it to last half an hour at most. You'll have time to build and siege castles in 2 hour gaming sessions even if you are in a small group of friends.

Join our official discord to join larger battles we arrange weekly! We use an ELO system which gurantantees balanced battles and that everyone loses and wins at similar rates in the long run.

It has been under development for more than a year and we've done 40+ official events. Check the gallery to see what players in teams ranging from 2 to 12 players have built.

# Server Setting Tutorial
1. Create multiple teams and assign them colors. Add players to their teams.
2. Change mod gamerules as you wish with the ```/mod_gamerules_ER``` command.
3. Adjust the worldborder size, between 1.2km and 2.2km is recommended.
4. Spread teams randomly around the map using the ```/spread_teams_ER``` command.
5. Begin the match using the ```/begin_match_ER``` command, picking the starting tools + goat horn initial kit is recommended.
6. Blood for the blood god.


# Match Review Feature
The mod records player movement, deaths and each team's control over territory, allowing for a sped up review to be animated afterward:
